rag_rules: Assume and guarantee statements must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings and assignments should be moved to implementation annexes
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reside within annex agree blocks in valid component type or implementation scopes
Only visible AADL features or declared helpers may be referenced in AGREE expressions
Generated AGREE code must not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the input model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool; avoid invalid type references like 'integer'
Component type contracts may only reference features visible at that scope; implementation bindings go in implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not place assume/guarantee statements in component implementation scopes; they must be in component types
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about empty packages
AGREE validator diagnostics about annex placement in implementations
